invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.0912（当前价）或融资费率进一步转正超过0.001%，则趋势跟随剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 0.0912 (current price) or funding rate turns more positive above 0.001%, negating the trend following scenario.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1800（日线支撑）或融资费率转正超过-0.002%，则轧空剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 1800 (daily support) or funding rate turns positive above -0.002%, negating the short squeeze scenario.
